## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Rule update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm dist:win`
- [ ] Manual desktop test
- [ ] Generated serverpack startup test

## Risk

- [ ] No migration or compatibility risk
- [ ] May affect generated serverpacks
- [ ] May affect saved settings
- [ ] May affect release artifacts

## Notes

Do not include CurseForge API keys, GitHub tokens, private server addresses, or unredacted `conversion-report.json` files.
